title: Reading Comprehension: Argument and Inference
description: Decode B2 texts — opinion pieces and reports — by identifying the main argument, recognising the writer's attitude and tone, making inferences, understanding vocabulary in context, and distinguishing fact from opinion.
sources: CEFR B2 descriptors (Council of Europe, Common European Framework of Reference)
Cambridge English: First (FCE) Reading and Use of English — Paper 1 task types and strategies
